es.meaning: To mess up; to make an embarrassing mistake.
es.example: Metí la pata olvidando su nombre.
es.exampleTranslation: I messed up by forgetting his name.

it.meaning: To embarrass oneself; to make a bad impression.
it.example: Ho fatto una figuraccia davanti a tutti.
it.exampleTranslation: I embarrassed myself in front of everyone.

bridge.note: Not a true match: Spanish is about making a blunder; Italian is about the social embarrassment that results. Related but distinct — worth teaching the nuance rather than pretending they're equivalents.

interference.es_to_it: figuraccia is the pejorative of figura (the -accia suffix). Learning the suffix pays off broadly.

review.notes: Pairing is imperfect — reviewer should confirm whether to keep or re-pair.
